preamble: Labio-velar glides can shift to palatal glides in specific phonetic contexts, often as part of a general palatalization trend.

examples.note: Rare cases where labio-velars shift to palatals through palatalization.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
